name: CEA Industries Inc.
business: CEA Industries Inc. is the largest publicly-traded digital asset treasury focused exclusively on BNB, the native token of the BNB Chain ecosystem. It also operates retail nicotine vape stores in Canada through its Fat Panda subsidiary and sells industrial climate control systems for indoor agriculture facilities.
sellsTo: Public equity market investors seeking BNB exposure
Retail consumers of vaping products in Canada
Indoor cultivation facility builders and operators

exposures.sentence: CEA Industries Inc. is the largest publicly-traded digital asset treasury ("DAT") focused exclusively on BNB, the native token of the BNB Chain ecosystem ("BNB Chain").
We acquired Fat Panda Ltd. and related entities ("Fat Panda") on June 6, 2025 and continue to operate its core retail nicotine vape operations in Canada.

Our legacy operating business seeks to develop relationships with our customers that will lead to the provision and supply of capital equipment for the construction lifecycle of indoor agriculture facilities.
The value and functionality of BNB are closely tied to the continued development, operation and adoption of the BNB Chain blockchain and the broader Binance ecosystem.
Our BNB holdings are held in custody through Ceffu, a non-U.S. institutional digital asset custody platform operating within the Binance ecosystem.

catalysts.event: Regain Nasdaq compliance by filing plan and holding annual meeting
catalysts.sentence: If Nasdaq accepts our plan, Nasdaq can grant an exception of up to 180 calendar days from the fiscal year ended April 30, 2026, or until October 27, 2026, to allow the Company to regain compliance.
We expect to organize an annual meeting in the coming weeks to regain compliance with the applicable Nasdaq Listing Rules.
